CardPatch.title: CardPatch
CardPatch.description: Partial update; provided content fields are re-validated per card type.

CardsStatus.title: CardsStatus
CardsStatus.description: Inline card-generation job state; null = never triggered. Imports don't touch it.

PackType.title: PackType
PackType.description:
Discriminator selecting the pack implementation (docs/02 §4.4):
`paper` = LLM-authored deep report; `article` = deterministic preserve
of the source's own structure.

SnapshotPatch.title: SnapshotPatch
SnapshotPatch.description:
Curation-time corrections; genre re-selects the processing strategy on
the next re-run.

SnapshotStatus.title: SnapshotStatus
SnapshotStatus.description:
Single-gate lifecycle: `ready` IS "in the library" — the snapshot-level
review gate is parked (spec 2026-07-02-single-gate-lifecycle-design.md).

SourceFeedOut.title: SourceFeedOut
SourceFeedOut.description:
The subscription feed that produced a snapshot (derived from
Source.emitted_by); null for ad-hoc captures.

SourceGenre.title: SourceGenre
